title: centaurea simplicicaulis subsp. adjarica
intro: Centaurea simplicicaulis subsp. adjarica, also known as the Adjarica knapweed, is a subspecies of perennial flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as wound healing, fever reduction, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and combat infection. Centaurea simplicicaulis subsp. adjarica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
